goal: Produce a detailed metaverse-direction execution plan with role-based ownership (Antigravity for art, Trae for copywriting, Codex for framework and hard tasks) while preserving most current systems.
constraints: Preserve current core gameplay and content baseline as default strategy.
Focus on phased expansion through additive architecture, not full rewrites.
Provide concrete milestone criteria, risk control, and team handoff rules.
deliverables: A comprehensive strategy document under docs/project for metaverse evolution roadmap.
Detailed role split and responsibility matrix for Antigravity, Trae, and Codex.
Execution sequence with quarter-level milestones, KPIs, and go/no-go gates.
